name: Barbell hip thrust
cue: Pause 1 sec at top. Ribs down, chin tucked, shins vertical.

name: Barbell Romanian deadlift
cue: Hips back, soft knees, feel hamstrings and glutes.

name: Conventional or sumo deadlift
cue: Heavy clean reps. Sumo may feel better for glutes/knees.

name: Dumbbell frog pumps / glute bridge
cue: Burnout. Squeeze glutes, don’t arch low back.

name: Side-lying hip abduction
cue: Slow reps for side glute/hip stability.

name: Standing calf raise
cue: Optional finisher.

name: Chest-supported dumbbell row
cue: Squeeze shoulder blades back and down.

name: Barbell bent-over row
cue: Heavy but controlled. No yanking.

name: Dumbbell rear delt fly
cue: Light and strict.

name: Dumbbell rear delt row
cue: Wide grip, pull to chest height, squeeze shoulder blades.

name: Prone Y-raise
cue: Lower traps. Tiny weights are enough.

name: Close-grip bench press
cue: Back of arms focus.

name: Overhead dumbbell triceps extension
cue: Long head of triceps.

name: Barbell glute bridge from floor
cue: Go heavy, but keep low back quiet.

name: Kickstand RDL
cue: Stable single-leg-ish hinge.

name: Dumbbell hamstring curl
cue: Hold DB between feet or use sliders.

name: Dumbbell sumo pull-through
cue: Hip snap, not a squat — swing the DB back through your legs.

name: B-stance hip thrust
cue: One glute works harder without knee stress.

name: Side plank / Copenhagen plank
cue: Optional hip/core stability.

name: Single-arm dumbbell row
cue: Pull elbow toward hip.

name: Dumbbell pullover
cue: Lats + rib control.

name: Scapular push-up
cue: Serratus for shoulder position.

name: Wall slides / floor angels
cue: Slow and controlled.

name: Dumbbell skull crushers
cue: Keep elbows steady.

name: Triceps kickbacks
cue: Light, strict, squeeze.

name: Glute bridge march
cue: March one leg up at a time, keep hips level and glutes squeezed.

name: Side bridge hip abduction
cue: Side-glute burnout, top leg lifts and lowers.

name: Frog pumps
cue: Finisher.

name: Dumbbell Romanian deadlift
cue: Hips back, soft knees, moderate weight.

name: Weighted front plank
weight: Light plate on back, or bodyweight
cue: Quick core finisher.

name: Barbell bench press
cue: Elbows at 45°, drive feet into the floor, touch chest lightly.

name: Standing overhead barbell press
cue: Brace core, press straight up, avoid leaning back.

name: Incline dumbbell press
cue: 30–45° incline, control the descent.

name: Lateral raise
cue: Lead with elbows, stop at shoulder height.

name: Skull crushers
cue: Elbows stay fixed, lower to forehead.

name: Barbell deadlift
cue: Neutral spine, push the floor away, bar stays close.

name: Barbell bicep curl
cue: Elbows locked at your sides, no swinging.

name: Hammer curl
cue: Neutral grip, controlled tempo.

name: Barbell front squat
cue: Elbows high, bar rests on front delts, stay upright.

name: Walking lunges
cue: Long stride, back knee kisses the floor.

name: Bulgarian split squat
cue: Front shin vertical, most weight on front leg.

name: Dumbbell goblet squat
cue: Hold DB at chest, squat between your knees, drive through the heels.

name: Leg press, glute-biased
cue: Feet high and wide on the platform to bias glutes.

name: Hip abduction machine
cue: Slow and controlled, squeeze at the outer range.

name: Cable kneeling crunch
cue: Round through the spine, exhale as you crunch.

name: Russian twist
cue: Rotate from your core, not your arms.

name: Cable triceps pushdown
cue: Keep elbows pinned to your sides, full extension.

name: Hanging leg raise
cue: Control the descent, don’t swing.

name: Cable standing hip extension
cue: Kick back and squeeze the glute at the top.

name: Seated leg curl
cue: Control the release, don’t let the weight drop.

name: Kettlebell swing
cue: Hip snap, not a squat.

name: Cable hip adduction
cue: Slow and controlled, squeeze the inner thigh.

name: Cable reverse crunch
cue: Curl your hips up and in, not just your legs.

name: Cable standing crunch
cue: Crunch down and in, exhale fully.

name: Cable pull-through
cue: Hip hinge, squeeze glutes at the top.

name: Cable lateral raise
cue: Constant tension, don’t rest at the bottom.

name: Bench dips
weight: Bodyweight, feet elevated to add difficulty
cue: Hands on bench edge, lower until elbows hit ~90°.

name: Dumbbell chest fly
cue: Slight elbow bend, squeeze at the top.

name: Seated dumbbell shoulder press
cue: Controlled descent to ear level.

name: Around the World
cue: Arms straight out to your sides, circle the dumbbells forward and overhead, then back down.

name: Shoulder Tap
cue: From a high plank, tap the opposite shoulder while keeping your hips and torso stable.

name: Front Plank
weight: Bodyweight, add a light plate later
cue: Forearms under your shoulders, body in a straight line, squeeze your glutes so your hips don’t sag.

name: Barbell Full Squat
cue: Bar across upper back, sit hips back and down, drive through heels to stand.

name: Barbell Sumo Deadlift
cue: Wide stance, toes out, push knees out and hinge hips back to lift.

name: Barbell Rack Pull
cue: Pull from knee height, drive hips forward hard at lockout.

name: Barbell Lunge
cue: Step forward, drop back knee toward floor, push through front heel.

name: Barbell Step-up
cue: Drive through the lead heel, avoid pushing off the trailing foot.

name: Barbell Seated Good Morning
cue: Hinge forward from the hips with a flat back, feel a hamstring stretch.

name: Barbell Lateral Lunge
cue: Step wide, sink into the bent knee, keep the other leg straight and push back to center.

name: Dumbbell Deadlift
cue: Hinge hips back, dumbbells close to shins, stand tall by squeezing glutes.

name: Dumbbell Lunge
cue: Step forward, torso upright, drive through the front heel back to standing.

name: Dumbbell Rear Lunge
cue: Step back into a lunge, keep weight in the front heel and knee tracking over toes.

name: Dumbbell Stiff Leg Deadlift
cue: Soft knees, hinge at the hips, keep dumbbells close and back flat.

name: Dumbbell Single Leg Deadlift
cue: Hinge on one leg, reach the free leg back for balance, squeeze glute to stand.

name: Dumbbell Step-up
cue: Full foot on the box, drive through the heel without pushing off the back leg.

name: Dumbbell Squat
cue: Sit back and down like into a chair, chest tall, drive up through mid-foot.

name: Dumbbell Single Leg Squat
cue: Keep one leg extended forward, squat down slow and controlled on the standing leg.

name: Dumbbell Contralateral Forward Lunge
cue: Step forward opposite the loaded arm, keep torso stacked and core braced.

name: Kettlebell Front Squat
cue: Hold the bell at chest height, elbows down, sit hips back and down.

name: Kettlebell Goblet Squat
cue: Hold the bell at your chest, knees track over toes, sit deep between your legs.

name: Kettlebell Lunge Pass Through
cue: Pass the bell under the front thigh as you lunge, keep chest up.

name: Cable Deadlift
cue: Hinge hips back keeping the cable close to your legs, squeeze glutes to stand.

name: Lever Horizontal One Leg Press
cue: One foot on the platform, press through the heel without locking the knee hard.

name: Sled 45° Leg Wide Press
cue: Feet high and wide on the platform to bias glutes on the press.

name: Lever Reverse Hyperextension
cue: Hang hips off the pad, squeeze glutes to swing legs up without swinging momentum.

name: Lever Hip Extension V. 2
cue: Drive through the heel to extend the hip, pause and squeeze at the top.

name: Smith Bent Knee Good Morning
cue: Soft knees, hinge forward at the hips keeping the bar path steady.

name: Smith Squat
cue: Feet slightly forward of the bar, sit back and down, drive up through heels.

name: Smith Sumo Squat
cue: Wide stance and toes out to bias inner thigh and glutes on the squat.

name: Rear Decline Bridge
cue: Feet elevated behind you, squeeze glutes to lift hips without arching low back.

name: Pelvic Tilt Into Bridge
cue: Tilt pelvis to flatten low back into the floor, then lift hips into a bridge.

name: One Leg Squat
cue: Extend one leg forward, sit back on the standing leg, use a support if needed.

name: Lever Seated Hip Adduction
cue: Squeeze knees together slowly, pause, then control the return.

name: Straight Leg Outer Hip Abductor
cue: Lift top leg straight up without rolling your hips back.

name: Butterfly Stretch
cue: Sit tall, press knees gently toward the floor with your elbows.

name: Side Plank Hip Adduction
cue: Hold a strong side plank while lifting the bottom leg to meet the top.

name: Air Bike
cue: Drive opposite elbow to opposite knee, exhale hard on each twist.

name: 3/4 Sit-up
cue: Curl partway up, keep lower back rounded, avoid pulling on your neck.

name: Reverse Crunch
cue: Lift hips off the floor by curling knees to chest, control the descent.

name: Dead Bug
cue: Press low back into the floor, extend opposite arm and leg slowly.

name: Side Bridge V. 2
cue: Stack hips and shoulders, keep body in one straight line.

name: Front Plank With Twist
cue: Rotate hips toward the floor while keeping shoulders square over hands.

name: Hanging Oblique Knee Raise
cue: Twist knees toward one shoulder at the top, alternate sides.

name: Hip Raise (bent Knee)
cue: Press heels down and lift hips using lower abs and glutes.

name: Oblique Crunches Floor
cue: Crunch straight up and slightly across, don't pull on your neck.

name: Spine Twist
cue: Seated, rotate torso side to side while keeping hips still.

name: Decline Sit-up
cue: Curl up smoothly from a decline bench, avoid yanking your neck.

name: Inchworm
cue: Walk hands out to a plank, keep core braced, walk feet back in.

name: Lunge With Twist
cue: Rotate torso toward the front knee at the bottom of each lunge.

name: Push-up To Side Plank
cue: After the push-up, rotate into a side plank, reaching top arm to ceiling.

name: Jackknife Sit-up
cue: Lift torso and legs together, reach hands toward your toes.

name: Incline Leg Hip Raise (leg Straight)
cue: On an incline bench, raise straight legs using lower abs, not momentum.

name: 45° Side Bend
cue: Bend straight to the side, feel obliques stretch and contract.

name: Dumbbell Side Bend
cue: Keep torso facing forward, lower the weight along your leg, then bend back up.

name: Spell Caster
cue: Hinge and swing the weight across your body, rotating through the core.

name: Weighted Crunch
cue: Hold weight on chest, curl shoulders up, exhale at the top.

name: Barbell Press Sit-up
cue: Keep bar steady on chest as you sit up, drive through your core.

name: Barbell Rollerout
cue: Brace hard, roll out only as far as you can keep your back flat.

name: Barbell Standing Twist
cue: Rotate through the torso, keep hips fairly still, control the bar path.

name: Landmine 180
cue: Rotate the bar side to side under control, pivot back foot with the swing.

name: Barbell Sitted Alternate Leg Raise
cue: Weight resting on thighs, lift one leg at a time using lower abs.

name: Cable Judo Flip
cue: Pull the handle down and across in one athletic rotational motion.

name: Cable Seated Crunch
cue: Crunch down by flexing the spine, not by pulling with your arms.

name: Cable Side Bend
cue: Bend sideways at the waist against cable resistance, control the return.

name: Cable Twist
cue: Rotate torso away from the machine, keep arms fixed relative to chest.

name: Cable Tuck Reverse Crunch
cue: Curl knees to chest against the cable, keep the movement slow.

name: Kettlebell Windmill
cue: Push hips back as you reach down, keep overhead arm straight and stacked.

name: Lever Seated Crunch (chest Pad)
cue: Crunch forward against the pad, exhale and squeeze at the bottom.

name: Smith Hip Raise
cue: Drive hips up into the bar, squeeze glutes and abs at the top.

name: Pull-up
cue: Pull chest to the bar, squeeze shoulder blades together at the top.

name: Narrow Parallel Grip Chin-up
cue: Keep elbows close to your body as you pull up to the bar.

name: Inverted Row
cue: Keep your body in a straight line, pull chest toward the bar.

name: Reverse Grip Pull-up
cue: Underhand grip, drive elbows down and back to pull yourself up.

name: Assisted Pull-up
cue: Set assistance so the last 2 reps feel challenging but controlled.

name: Hyperextension
cue: Hinge at the hips and rise until your body is a straight line, don't overextend.

name: Lat Pulldown
cue: Pull the bar to your upper chest, lead with your elbows.

name: Seated High Row, V-Bar
cue: Drive elbows back and pinch shoulder blades at full contraction.

name: Low Seated Cable Row
cue: Sit tall, pull handles to your torso without leaning back excessively.

name: Cable One Arm Bent Over Row
cue: Hinge forward, row the handle to your hip keeping your back flat.

name: Cable Shrug
cue: Elevate shoulders straight up toward your ears, avoid rolling them.

name: Standing Cable Row, V-Bar
cue: Stand tall and row the handle to your abdomen, squeeze your back.

name: Straight Arm Cable Pushdown
cue: Keep arms straight, sweep the bar down using your lats, not your arms.

name: Seated Row Machine
cue: Chest against the pad, pull handles to your torso and squeeze.

name: High Row Machine
cue: Pull handles toward your chest, driving elbows down and back.

name: T-Bar Row Machine
cue: Chest supported, row the handles straight up toward your ribs.

name: Reverse Grip Lat Pulldown
cue: Underhand grip, pull the bar to your chest and squeeze your lats.

name: Shrug Machine
cue: Shrug straight up, pause briefly, then lower under control.

name: Back Extension Machine
cue: Extend through the hips and lower back without hyperextending at the top.

name: Assisted Close Grip Pull-up
cue: Palms facing each other, pull your chest up toward the bars.

name: Barbell Pendlay Row
cue: Start each rep from the floor, pull explosively to your lower chest.

name: Barbell Incline Row
cue: Chest supported on the incline bench, row the bar to your torso.

name: Barbell Reverse Grip Bent Over Row
cue: Underhand grip, hinge forward and row the bar to your waist.

name: Barbell Shrug
cue: Shrug straight up toward your ears, don't roll your shoulders.

name: Cambered Bar Lying Row
cue: Lie face down on the bench, row the bar straight up to your chest.

name: Dumbbell Bent Over Row
cue: Hinge at the hips, keep your back flat, row both dumbbells to your ribs.

name: Dumbbell One Arm Bent-over Row
cue: Brace on a bench, row the dumbbell up toward your hip, elbow close.

name: Dumbbell Shrug
cue: Let arms hang straight, shrug shoulders up and hold briefly.

name: Dumbbell Incline Shrug
cue: Lie chest-down on an incline bench, shrug straight up toward your ears.

name: Dumbbell Incline One Arm Row
cue: Chest supported on the incline bench, row the dumbbell to your ribs.

name: Dumbbell Lying Rear Delt Row
cue: Face down on the bench, row dumbbells up and out, squeezing shoulder blades.

name: Kettlebell One Arm Row
cue: Hinge forward, keep back flat, row the kettlebell to your hip.

name: Kettlebell Two Arm Row
cue: Hinge at the hips, row both kettlebells up toward your ribs together.

name: Barbell Wide Squat
cue: Wide stance, toes out, track knees over toes as you descend.

name: Barbell Single Leg Split Squat
cue: Long stride, drop back knee straight down, drive through front heel.

name: Barbell Straight Leg Deadlift
cue: Soft knees, hinge hips back, feel the stretch through hamstrings.

name: Barbell Good Morning
cue: Bar on back, hinge at hips with a slight knee bend, chest up.

name: Barbell Standing Calf Raise
cue: Rise onto your toes, pause, lower slow past parallel for a stretch.

name: Lever Leg Extension
cue: Extend to full lockout, squeeze quads, lower under control.

name: Lever Kneeling Leg Curl
cue: Curl heels to glutes, kneel tall, don't let hips pike up.

name: Lever Alternate Leg Press
cue: Press one leg at a time, control the negative, don't lock knee hard.

name: Lever Standing Calf Raise
cue: Shoulders under pads, rise onto toes, full stretch at bottom.

name: Lever Seated Calf Raise
cue: Knees bent under pad, press through the balls of your feet.

name: Smith Single Leg Split Squat
cue: Rear foot on bench, lower straight down, front knee tracks toes.

name: Smith Chair Squat
cue: Squat back to a light tap on the chair, then stand tall.

name: Dumbbell Supported Squat
cue: Chest up, hips back, sit into a controlled squat.

name: Dumbbell Step-up Split Squat
cue: Drive through the front heel to step up, control the lower back down.

name: Dumbbell Step-up Lunge
cue: Full foot on the step, push up without pushing off the back leg.

name: Dumbbell Lying Femoral
cue: Dumbbell held between feet, curl heels toward glutes.

name: Dumbbell Single Leg Calf Raise
cue: One dumbbell, one leg, rise slow and full onto the toes.

name: Dumbbell Seated Calf Raise
cue: Balls of feet on a block, drive through toes, stretch at bottom.

name: Donkey Calf Raise
cue: Hinge forward slightly, rise onto toes from a hanging heel stretch.

name: Bodyweight Standing Calf Raise
cue: Rise onto toes, pause at the top, lower with control.

name: Inverse Leg Curl (bench Support)
cue: Hips on bench edge, curl legs by pulling heels toward you.

name: Self Assisted Inverse Leg Curl
cue: Feet planted, lift hips, then slide heels out and back in.

name: Standing Single Leg Curl
cue: Balance on one leg, curl the other heel toward your glute.

name: Suspended Split Squat
cue: Rear foot in the strap, lower straight down on the front leg.

name: Single Leg Platform Slide
cue: Slide the foot back smoothly, feel hamstrings lengthen and contract.

name: Cable Standing Calf Raise
cue: Rise onto toes against the resistance, lower for a full stretch.

name: Cable Assisted Inverse Leg Curl
cue: Ankle strap secured, curl heels toward glutes against the cable.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
cue: Lower with control to chest level, press up until arms extend without locking hard.

name: Barbell Incline Bench Press
cue: Set bench to 45 degrees, drive bar up and slightly back toward eyes.

name: Barbell Decline Bench Press
cue: Secure feet, lower bar to lower chest, press straight up.

name: Dumbbell Incline Fly
cue: Arc dumbbells out and down with a slight elbow bend, squeeze chest to bring them back together.

name: Dumbbell Decline Fly
cue: Head lower than hips, open arms wide then squeeze back together over chest.

name: Push-up
cue: Keep body in a straight line, lower chest to floor, press back up.

name: Incline Push-up
cue: Hands on an elevated surface, easier angle for building push-up strength.

name: Decline Push-up
cue: Feet elevated on a bench, core tight, lower chest toward the floor.

name: Chest Dip
cue: Lean forward and lower until shoulders dip below elbows, press back up.

name: Assisted Chest Dip
cue: Kneel on the pad for support and lower under control to build toward full dips.

name: Lever Chest Press
cue: Set seat so handles align with mid-chest, press forward without shrugging.

name: Lever Incline Chest Press
cue: Incline angle targets upper chest, press handles up and slightly forward.

name: Lever Decline Chest Press
cue: Decline angle biases lower chest, press through a full range without locking out hard.

name: Lever Seated Fly
cue: Elbows slightly bent, squeeze handles together in front of chest.

name: Smith Bench Press
cue: Guided bar path lets you focus on a controlled lower and press.

name: Cable Bench Press
cue: Stand tall, press handles forward together at chest height for constant tension.

name: Cable Low Fly
cue: Pulleys set low, sweep hands up and inward to squeeze upper chest.

name: Cable Standing Fly
cue: Step slightly forward, bring handles together in front of chest with soft elbows.

name: Cable Cross-over Variation
cue: Cross hands in front of body at the bottom, squeeze chest through the finish.

name: Dumbbell Lying Hammer Press
cue: Palms facing each other, press dumbbells straight up over chest.

name: Dumbbell Lying One Arm Press
cue: Brace core to resist rotation while pressing one dumbbell up at a time.

name: Dumbbell Decline Bench Press
cue: Head lower than hips, press dumbbells up and slightly together.

name: Dumbbell Incline Hammer Press
cue: Palms facing in, press dumbbells up along the incline angle.

name: Dumbbell Straight Arm Pullover
cue: Keep a slight elbow bend, lower behind head then pull back over chest.

name: Kettlebell One Arm Floor Press
cue: Lie on floor, press kettlebell straight up from the ground one side at a time.

name: Barbell Floor Fly
cue: Lying on the floor, lower bar with soft elbows until upper arms touch ground.

name: Barbell Decline Pullover
cue: On a decline bench, lower bar behind head then pull back over chest.

name: Shoulder Tap Push-up
cue: Hold a plank and tap opposite shoulder each rep without letting hips rotate.

name: Chest And Front Of Shoulder Stretch
cue: Arms out at shoulder height, gently open chest and hold the stretch.

name: Cable One Arm Incline Press
cue: Seated on an incline bench, press one handle up and forward at a time.

name: Barbell Front Raise
cue: Keep a slight bend in elbows, raise to shoulder height, don't swing.

name: Barbell Rear Delt Raise
cue: Hinge forward, flat back, lift bar out to sides squeezing shoulder blades.

name: Barbell Rear Delt Row
cue: Hinge forward, pull bar to lower chest, lead with elbows high.

name: Barbell Seated Overhead Press
cue: Brace core, press straight overhead without arching your low back.

name: Barbell Upright Row
cue: Pull bar close to body, lead with elbows, stop at chest height.

name: Dumbbell Front Raise
cue: Raise dumbbells to shoulder height with straight arms, exhale on the way up.

name: Dumbbell Arnold Press V. 2
cue: Rotate palms out to in as you press overhead for full delt activation.

name: Dumbbell Bench Seated Press
cue: Press dumbbells up and slightly in, don't let elbows flare too wide.

name: Dumbbell Full Can Lateral Raise
cue: Raise arms to the sides like pouring a can, lead with thumbs up.

name: Dumbbell Lying Rear Lateral Raise
cue: Face down on bench, raise dumbbells out to sides, squeeze shoulder blades.

name: Dumbbell Incline Raise
cue: Lean back on incline bench, raise dumbbells to shoulder height with control.

name: Dumbbell Iron Cross
cue: Raise arms out to a T shape, keep a slight bend in the elbows.

name: Dumbbell Cuban Press
cue: Row to shoulder height, rotate into overhead press, then reverse slowly.

name: Dumbbell One Arm Lateral Raise
cue: Raise one arm to the side to shoulder height, avoid shrugging up.

name: Cable Cross-over Reverse Fly
cue: Pull handles out and back in a wide arc, squeeze shoulder blades together.

name: Cable Front Raise
cue: Raise the handle straight in front to shoulder height, control the descent.

name: Cable Shoulder Press
cue: Press handles overhead, keeping core tight and ribs stacked over hips.

name: Cable One Arm Lateral Raise
cue: Raise handle out to the side with steady cable tension throughout.

name: Cable Upright Row
cue: Pull the attachment up along your body, elbows leading and above wrists.

name: Cable Standing Shoulder External Rotation
cue: Elbow pinned to your side, rotate forearm outward slowly for rotator cuff health.

name: Lever Lateral Raise
cue: Raise arms out to sides against the pads, avoid shrugging shoulders up.

name: Lever Military Press
cue: Press handles straight overhead, keep back flat against the pad.

name: Lever Shoulder Press
cue: Press handles up and slightly forward, control the weight on the way down.

name: Lever Seated Reverse Fly
cue: Chest against pad, sweep handles out wide, squeeze shoulder blades.

name: Lever One Arm Shoulder Press
cue: Press one side at a time, keep torso still and avoid twisting.

name: Smith Shoulder Press
cue: Press the bar straight overhead, feet planted, ribs stacked over hips.

name: Kettlebell Alternating Press
cue: Press one kettlebell up while the other stays racked at the shoulder.

name: Kettlebell Arnold Press
cue: Rotate palms from facing you to forward as you press overhead.

name: Kettlebell Two Arm Military Press
cue: Press both kettlebells overhead together, avoid leaning back.

name: Kettlebell Seated Two Arm Military Press
cue: Seated for stability, press both kettlebells overhead without arching back.

name: Rear Deltoid Stretch
cue: Pull arm across chest gently, hold without forcing the stretch.

name: Dumbbell Biceps Curl
cue: Keep elbows pinned to your sides, curl without swinging.

name: Barbell Alternate Biceps Curl
cue: Curl one arm at a time, keep upper arms still.

name: Cable Curl
cue: Keep constant tension, don't let the bar drift forward.

name: Lever Bicep Curl
cue: Squeeze at the top, control the negative on the way down.

name: Dumbbell Hammer Curl
cue: Palms face each other the whole rep to hit the brachialis.

name: Cable Hammer Curl
cue: Neutral grip on the rope, elbows locked at your sides.

name: Dumbbell Cross Body Hammer Curl
cue: Curl the dumbbell across toward the opposite shoulder.

name: Barbell Preacher Curl
cue: Rest upper arms flat on the pad, avoid locking elbows out hard.

name: Dumbbell Concentration Curl
cue: Brace elbow on your inner thigh, curl slow with no swing.

name: Cable Concentration Curl
cue: Elbow braced on thigh, curl toward the shoulder under steady tension.

name: Dumbbell Incline Biceps Curl
cue: Let arms hang straight down off the incline bench for a full stretch.

name: Barbell Reverse Curl
cue: Overhand grip, curl slowly to hammer forearms and brachialis.

name: Cable Reverse Curl
cue: Overhand grip on the bar, keep wrists straight through the curl.

name: Barbell Drag Curl
cue: Drag the bar up along your torso, elbows travel back not forward.

name: Barbell Standing Close Grip Curl
cue: Hands close together, elbows tucked tight to bias the long head.

name: Ez Barbell Curl
cue: Standard shoulder-width grip on the EZ-bar, curl without leaning back.

name: Cable Lying Bicep Curl
cue: Lying flat keeps constant tension through the whole curl.

name: Cable One Arm Preacher Curl
cue: One arm on the pad at a time, focus on full stretch at the bottom.

name: Barbell Standing Wide-grip Curl
cue: Wide grip shifts emphasis to the short head of the biceps.

name: Barbell Wrist Curl
cue: Rest forearms on thighs, curl only at the wrist for forearm size.

name: Barbell Reverse Wrist Curl
cue: Palms down on thighs, lift only the knuckles to hit wrist extensors.

name: Cable Wrist Curl
cue: Forearms on thighs, roll the bar down to fingertips then curl up.

name: Dumbbell One Arm Wrist Curl
cue: Rest forearm on thigh, curl just the wrist through a full range.

name: Wrist Circles
cue: Slow controlled circles each direction to warm up the wrists.

name: Side Wrist Pull Stretch
cue: Gently pull fingers back to stretch the wrist and forearm.

name: Lever Gripper Hands
cue: Squeeze the handles fully closed, control the release.
